# Data notes {#sec-data-notes}

<!-- Purpose: data sources, vintages, methodology, and reliability notes. Doubles as PHA
     capacity-building documentation (EXECUTION-PLAN §3). Built in Phase E, Task 14. -->

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
source("_common.R")
```

*Appendix stub — content built in Phase E, Task 14 (see PLAN.md §9).*
